subject: First Baptist Weekly Newsletter - October 18
body_preview: This week at First Baptist: Sunday service at 11, Senior Saints potluck Thursday, and outreach committee updates.

subject: Senior Saints Potluck - Bring a Dish
body_preview: Please sign up for a covered dish this Thursday. We still need desserts and a green vegetable.

subject: Retirees Luncheon at Cracker Barrel
body_preview: So good to see everyone last month. Our next get-together is October 15 at noon. Hope you and Chad can make it.

subject: Fwd: Church Directory Photo Update
body_preview: We are refreshing the member directory. Please stop by the office after service to update your photo.

subject: Nutrition Program Retiree Note
body_preview: Thank you for your years of service in our cafeterias. You are invited to the district retiree appreciation day.

subject: First Baptist Weekly Newsletter - October 25
body_preview: This week: Veterans Day breakfast planning, Christmas Eve service volunteers needed, and a note from Pastor Whitlow.

subject: Wanda says hello
body_preview: Been thinking about you and Chad. Lets catch up at the luncheon. My knee is finally doing better.
